text: Sony IMX477 (EO Camera) Parameter Value Resolution 12.3MP (4056x3040) Pixel Size 1.55µm Shutter Global reset (pseudo-global) CSI-2 Lanes 4-lane @ 1.5Gbps/lane Output Formats RAW12, RAW10, YUV422 Dynamic Range 76.9dB (HDR mode: 120dB via DOL) Frame Rate 4K @ 30fps / 1080p @ 60fps ISP Pipeline on Jetson: RAW12 -> Bayer demosaic -> White balance -> Tonemap -> YUV420 (for TensorRT).
